name: 05-07-npc-llm-only-runtime
title: NPC LLM-only runtime boundary
description: Route all NPC chat through LLM: current built-in/developed public-welfare spaces use the system public-welfare LLM, while future owner taverns require owner LLM config and must not fall back to local rules NPC replies.
creator: lijin
notes: User decision: policy C, with clarification that all previously developed/built-in spaces are public welfare. NPC chat must not use local rules replies. Public-welfare spaces should use the versioned system public-welfare LLM; owner-created spaces need owner LLM and degrade without an NPC reply if unavailable.
